segments.text: Right when he throws it out, he punishes with a nair!
segments.original_text: コマを出した瞬間に空中ニュートラルで差し返します

segments.text: That whiff punish is incredibly well executed!
segments.original_text: このね差し返しが非常に上手いですね
そしてリンゴ上に飛ぶこの技ですが

segments.text: He barely pulls it off but...
segments.original_text: ギリギリでステアしなかった

full_text: Right when he throws it out, he punishes with a nair! That whiff punish is incredibly well executed! And this move heading upward... He barely pulls it off but... The spacing is insanely tight!
